zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha de Braose於1151年出生時，她的父親William de Braose II39歲，母親Bertha of Gloucester36歲。她和Sir Walter Beauchamp至少有3個兒子。她去世於1200年11月19日在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年49歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha de Braose于1151年出生时，她的父亲William de Braose II39岁，母亲Bertha of Gloucester36岁。她和Sir Walter Beauchamp至少有3个儿子。她去世于1200年11月19日在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年49岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha de Braose was born in 1151, her father, William de Braose II, was 39 and her mother, Bertha of Gloucester, was 36. She had at least 3 sons with Sir Walter Beauchamp. She died on 19 November 1200, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 49, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha de Braose est née en 1151, son père, William de Braose II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Bertha of Gloucester, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir Walter Beauchamp. Elle est décédée le 19 novembre 1200, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha de Braose 1151 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Braose II 39 und ihre Mutter Bertha of Gloucester 36. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter Beauchamp mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 19. November 1200 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha de Braose è nata il nel 1151, sua padre, William de Braose II, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Bertha of Gloucester, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Sir Walter Beauchamp. Morì il 19 novembre 1200, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha de Braoseが1151年に生まれた時，父William de Braose IIは39歳，母Bertha of Gloucesterは36歳であった。彼女はSir Walter Beauchampとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1200年11月19日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで49歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha de Braose(이)가 1151년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha of Gloucester(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 11월 19일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha de Braose nasceu em 1151, seu pai, William de Braose II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Bertha of Gloucester, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Sir Walter Beauchamp. Ela faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1200, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha de Braose родилась в 1151 г., её отцу по имени William de Braose II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha of Gloucester, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Sir Walter Beauchamp. Она умерла 19 ноября 1200 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha de Braose nació en 1151, su papá, William de Braose II, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Bertha of Gloucester, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Sir Walter Beauchamp. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1200, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
